title: Dil Kush
overview: This film revolves around the protagonist Khushal, who develops strong feelings for a girl during his school and college years. However, when she leaves for Kerala to pursue her studies, Khushal believes he has no more space for love. His perspective changes when Dilmaya enters his life. The plot explores whether Khushal ends up marrying Dilmaya or if his parents intervene with their own romantic interests, particularly with Nandini.
